extract: Work Up (Japanese: ふるいたてる Cheer Up) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM83 in Generation V. TM01 in Pokémon Sun and Moon and Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TR85 in Pokémon Sword and Shield TM10 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM103 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
